title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer wants implementation-specific assertions removed from the credential and fernet reconcile tests at the noted lines (reconcile_credential_test.go:648 and :677, reconcile_fernet_test.go:641).

code_comments.body: That's too implementation specific. You can remove these checks
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Too implementation specific. You can remove these
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

resolution_summary: Addressed all three reviewer comments by removing overly implementation-specific assertions from the embedded-script tests. In both `reconcile_credential_test.go` and `reconcile_fernet_test.go`, the `isoformat(timespec="seconds")` substring check was deleted since it pins the tests to an exact Python idiom rather than observable behavior. Additionally, the `migrateIdx < patchIdx` ordering assertion was dropped from `TestCredentialRotateScript_MigrateBeforePatch` for the same reason. No other files or locations were changed.
